name: Locked out user receives error message on login
preconditions: The application is accessible and the login page is loaded
The user account 'locked_out_user' exists in the system with a locked status
No active session exists in the browser

test_data.expected_error_message: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

steps.action: Navigate to the application login page
steps.expected: The Login Page is displayed with username field, password field, and a Login button visible

steps.action: Enter the locked out username into the Username field
steps.expected: The username 'locked_out_user' appears in the Username input field

steps.action: Enter the password into the Password field
steps.expected: The password is entered and displayed as masked characters in the Password input field
The form is submitted; the page does not navigate away from the login page

steps.action: Verify an error message container is displayed on the page
steps.expected: An error message banner or container is visible on the Login Page

steps.action: Verify the exact text content of the error message
steps.test_data: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
steps.expected: The error message reads exactly: 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'

steps.action: Verify the user remains on the Login Page and is not redirected to any authenticated page
steps.expected: The current URL remains at the login page URL and no authenticated content (e.g., product inventory) is visible

postconditions: No authenticated session is created for locked_out_user
The browser remains on the login page
